creator: exploringlondon
caption:
This is @olympialondon’s first opening, part of the £1.3bn regeneration project 🔥 Say hello to @idalia.restaurant at @pillarhall.london, a stunning 140 year old, Grade II listed building, home to Britain’s first film screens and @viviennewestwood’s first catwalk show! The space has high ceilings, beautiful greenery and incredible architecture.

Idalia brings a fresh twist to modern British dining with beautifully crafted dishes, standout drinks (don’t miss their handbag drink!) and spectacular desserts (think pistachio cheesecake made with real pistachios, and a high heel dessert!)

Share this with someone who would love to go!
📍Olympia Way, London W14 0EY

transcription.text: This part of London has had a 1.3 billion pound regeneration and the first restaurant inside has just opened. Say hello to Idalia now open at Olympia's Pillar Hall. I mean this has to be one of London's most beautiful restaurants. Set within a grade 2 listed hall that was once home to Britain's earliest film screenings as well as a venue for Vivienne Westwood's first catwalk show. This 140 year old landmark now has a glamorous restaurant and the food is top tier. They have an all-female kitchen, standout drinks and a modern British menu. Their desserts are also spectacular so make sure you save some room for them. Share this with someone who would love to go.
